boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?

final_answer: ESCALATE required. REL-AST-081 covers PO-AST-081 and controls but omits exact hazard-control evidence demanded by WARN-AST-081 and STD-AST-081-P for regulated AS-44. Boundary remains open; execution blocked until precise status proof supplied.
